name: Keragon
description: Keragon — HIPAA-compliant workflow automation for healthcare. No-code iPaaS connecting EHRs, patient portals, billing, and scheduling tools.

seo.title: Keragon — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Keragon: Keragon — HIPAA-compliant workflow automation for healthcare. No-code iPaaS connecting EHRs, patient portals, billing, and scheduling tools.

when_to_use: HIPAA-compliant workflow automation for healthcare ops teams
No-code integration connecting EHRs, billing, and patient portals
Automating patient intake and referral processes securely
Replacing manual data entry between healthcare platforms
Connecting Athena, Epic, and Salesforce in one no-code flow

pros: Healthcare-specific connectors to EHRs and billing
No-code accessible to clinical operations teams
Faster to ship than Zapier plus BAA workarounds
cons: Smaller connector catalog than generic iPaaS
Pricing aimed at clinics, not dev orgs
Audit and documentation depth still growing
review.verdict: Best no-code automation for US healthcare teams; irrelevant outside HIPAA-regulated workflows.
review.best_for: US clinics and healthtech ops teams automating HIPAA-regulated workflows
review.not_for: Non-healthcare orgs or engineering teams preferring code-first automation

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Standard subscription/seat plan; downgradable next cycle.
